result.stdout:
Description:
  Playwright Page Object Model Generator for Angular applications and libraries

Usage:
  PlaywrightPomGenerator.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  --header <header>            Header template for generated files. Supports placeholders: {FileName}, {GeneratedDate}, {ToolVersion}. By default, no header is included.
  --test-suffix <test-suffix>  Suffix for test files (default: 'spec'). For example, 'test' produces 'component.test.ts'.
  --debug                      Enable debug mode. When enabled, the HTML template is included as a comment in generated page object files.
  --version                    Show version information
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information

Commands:
  app <path>             Generate Playwright Page Object Model tests for a single Angular application
  workspace <path>       Generate Playwright Page Object Model tests for an Angular workspace
  lib <path>             Generate Playwright Page Object Model tests for a single Angular library
  artifacts <path>       Generate specific Playwright artifacts (fixtures, configs, selectors, page objects, helpers)
  signalr-mock <output>  Generate a fully functional SignalR mock fixture using RxJS [default: .]
  remote <url>           Generate Playwright Page Object Model tests from a remote git repository URL (GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, Azure DevOps, or any git host)

Description:
  Generate Playwright Page Object Model tests for a single Angular application

Usage:
  PlaywrightPomGenerator.Cli app <path> [options]

Arguments:
  <path>  Path to the Angular application

Options:
  -o, --output <output>        Output directory for generated files
  --header <header>            Header template for generated files. Supports placeholders: {FileName}, {GeneratedDate}, {ToolVersion}. By default, no header is included.
  --test-suffix <test-suffix>  Suffix for test files (default: 'spec'). For example, 'test' produces 'component.test.ts'.
  --debug                      Enable debug mode. When enabled, the HTML template is included as a comment in generated page object files.
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate specific Playwright artifacts (fixtures, configs, selectors, page objects, helpers)

Usage:
  PlaywrightPomGenerator.Cli artifacts <path> [options]

Arguments:
  <path>  Path to the Angular workspace or application

Options:
  -o, --output <output>        Output directory for generated files
  -p, --project <project>      Specific project name (for workspaces)
  -f, --fixtures               Generate test fixtures
  -c, --configs                Generate Playwright configuration
  -s, --selectors              Generate selector files
  --page-objects               Generate page object files
  --helpers                    Generate helper utilities
  -a, --all                    Generate all artifacts
  --header <header>            Header template for generated files. Supports placeholders: {FileName}, {GeneratedDate}, {ToolVersion}. By default, no header is included.
  --test-suffix <test-suffix>  Suffix for test files (default: 'spec'). For example, 'test' produces 'component.test.ts'.
  --debug                      Enable debug mode. When enabled, the HTML template is included as a comment in generated page object files.
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Generate specific Playwright artifacts (fixtures, configs, selectors, page objects, helpers)

Usage:

  --debug                      Enable debug mode. When enabled, the HTML template is included as a comment in generated page object files.
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate Playwright Page Object Model tests from a remote git repository URL (GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, Azure DevOps, or any git host)

Usage:
  PlaywrightPomGenerator.Cli remote <url> [options]

Arguments:
  <url>  Git URL to a component file, folder, or repository (e.g., https://github.com/owner/repo/blob/main/src/app/my-component/my-component.ts)

Options:
  -o, --output <output>        Output directory for generated files. Defaults to the current working directory.
  --header <header>            Header template for generated files. Supports placeholders: {FileName}, {GeneratedDate}, {ToolVersion}. By default, no header is included.
  --test-suffix <test-suffix>  Suffix for test files (default: 'spec'). For example, 'test' produces 'component.test.ts'.
  --debug                      Enable debug mode. When enabled, the HTML template is included as a comment in generated page object files.
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:
  PlaywrightPomGenerator.Cli remote <url> [options]

Arguments:
  <url>  Git URL to a component file, folder, or repository (e.g., https://github.com/owner/repo/blob/main/src/app/my-component/my-component.ts)

Options:
  -o, --output <output>        Output directory for generated files. Defaults to the current working directory.
  --header <header>            Header template for generated files. Supports placeholders: {FileName}, {GeneratedDate}, {ToolVersion}. By default, no header is included.
  --test-suffix <test-suffix>  Suffix for test files (default: 'spec'). For example, 'test' produces 'component.test.ts'.
  --debug                      Enable debug mode. When enabled, the HTML template is included as a comment in generated page object files.
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate a fully functional SignalR mock fixture using RxJS

Usage:
  PlaywrightPomGenerator.Cli signalr-mock [<output>] [options]

Arguments:
  <output>  Output directory for the generated SignalR mock file [default: .]

Options:
  --header <header>            Header template for generated files. Supports placeholders: {FileName}, {GeneratedDate}, {ToolVersion}. By default, no header is included.
  --test-suffix <test-suffix>  Suffix for test files (default: 'spec'). For example, 'test' produces 'component.test.ts'.
  --debug                      Enable debug mode. When enabled, the HTML template is included as a comment in generated page object files.
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate Playwright Page Object Model tests for an Angular workspace

Usage:
  PlaywrightPomGenerator.Cli workspace <path> [options]

Arguments:
  <path>  Path to the Angular workspace

Options:
  -o, --output <output>        Output directory for generated files
  -p, --project <project>      Specific project name to generate for (generates for all applications if not specified)
  --header <header>            Header template for generated files. Supports placeholders: {FileName}, {GeneratedDate}, {ToolVersion}. By default, no header is included.
  --test-suffix <test-suffix>  Suffix for test files (default: 'spec'). For example, 'test' produces 'component.test.ts'.
  --debug                      Enable debug mode. When enabled, the HTML template is included as a comment in generated page object files.
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information
